Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details 158 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework 297 upvotes, 59 comments
  3. A ternary plot of citrus geneology 144 upvotes, 27 comments
  4. Show HN: Tensor Spy: inspect NumPy and PyTorch tensors in the browser, no upload 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 487 upvotes, 143 comments
  6. Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 987 upvotes, 352 comments
  7. Show HN: Swarm – Program a colony of 200 ants using a custom assembly language 107 upvotes, 29 comments
  8. Screeching Sound of Peeling Tape 29 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests 212 upvotes, 73 comments
  10. How to install and start using LineageOS on your phone 77 upvotes, 22 comments
  11. CBP tapped into the online advertising ecosystem to track peoples’ movements 475 upvotes, 189 comments
  12. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 20 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Stupidly Obscure Programming in a Troubled Time (2018) 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 699 upvotes, 346 comments
  15. Good software knows when to stop 463 upvotes, 233 comments
  16. Remotely unlocking an encrypted hard disk 160 upvotes, 73 comments
  17. GPL upgrades via section 14 proxy delegation 60 upvotes, 24 comments
  18. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 54 upvotes, 22 comments
  19. System76 on Age Verification Laws 481 upvotes, 295 comments
  20. Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app 117 upvotes, 61 comments
  21. Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs 973 upvotes, 695 comments
  22. GPT-5.4 874 upvotes, 689 comments
  23. The Brand Age 381 upvotes, 297 comments
  24. Where things stand with the Department of War 494 upvotes, 521 comments
  25. AI and the Ship of Theseus 122 upvotes, 127 comments
  26. Ask HN: How many of you hold an amateur radio license in your country? 30 upvotes, 31 comments
  27. Labor market impacts of AI: A new measure and early evidence 230 upvotes, 331 comments
  28. Image manipulation with convolution using Julia 5 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. If AI has a bright future, why does AI think it doesn't? 8 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. Stardex (YC S21) is hiring customer success engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:30pm, 6 March 2026. Source here.
